description: Very positive experience with iClassPro overall. Easy setup process and information transfer with help of customer service reps. The cons for the system are minimal compared to the pros. Cloud based system keeps information safe and available from anywhere.
author: Tres M.
pros: Constantly evolving and improving and adding features. Wonderful customer service. Comprehensive solution for scheduling lessons and birthday parties, customer management and online access for parents and staff.
cons: Notes are difficult to work with because there isn't one simple place to see or search for them for account related information, student information, enrollment information, etc. There isn't a designated option for managing private lessons. Mass text messages can't be sent from the 'classes' page and filtering specific classes or days is cumbersome at best in the 'family' and 'student' pages and that is important for contacting specific classes for cancellations, make-ups, etc.

description: Overall the software is great, it manages the students charges and families with ease. It never gives me any trouble, there are no significant bugs, and small ones get fixed once the team is notified.
author: Josiah P.
pros: I think IClassPro is the best software for managing a Swim School, its consistently updating with useful features, such as autopilot. This saves us administrative time, and makes life very easy.
cons: I still think that its missing some key integrations features such as with banking's software's, Zapier and other things that many other software have had for years.

author: Alexa G.
pros: How many functions are in one site. The ability to schedule, staff, run reports all in one space is convenient.
cons: Frequent site crashes or lags which do not allow us to continue utilizing the site or the features.

review_title: What you look forward to in business !
description: Amazing! [sensitive content hidden] was super helpful and caring! She reviewed all my questions and answered emails very quickly.
author: Mitchel S.
pros: Convent and great customer support. Anything I had a question with was answered. The programs are also amazing.
cons: Can’t find anything this very second that only least favorite. Maybe wishing people could have multiple iclasspro accounts all linked to one?
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One of the best platforms for our industry
description: Really good platform and probably one of the best out there that is specific to our industry. I would like to see more sophisticated reporting functions as we are at the point of wanting to scale and measure in more detail.
author: Samantha P.
pros: Love the Parent portal where families can access assessment outcomes and news. It's one of the main reasons we moved across to ICP. They are proactive in helping whenever we need and are welcoming of any feedback. The uniform shop is really good too. Easy to integrate into website and customise headings. Most of the reporting and customer financial set up is pretty good. It covers the basics of what any studio / club would need.
cons: Would like more detailed reports for assessments, trials and conversions. As well as financial reports that can break down which families are on what payment structure and help us project ahead for budgeting purposes. Would be good to have a feature for customers to enter their government voucher number upon enrolment so make the systems more automated. Would love to see ICP use a timetable view instead of list view for website integration.

review_title: Iclasspro is the best software hands down. I have tried most of the others.
description: Amazing. Always easy and helpful. Product does what I need and then some.
author: Randy D.
pros: Customer Service and the features they release regularly. They listen to what their customers need and are always trying to make the software better.
cons: Nothing - I dont have any issues I do not like.

description: We have been using iclass for about 2 months and I am still working on finding out all the things about it.
author: Nicole G.
pros: I love the customer service and how knowledgeable everyone is and willing to not get upset with us for not knowing.
cons: To be honest at this time I do not see anything that I think is a con.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We love iClassPro, and all the support you get with it.
author: Jennifer T.
pros: We love the ease of use. The reports feature is a plus, as the financial reports are my favorite because everything is one place.
cons: The quickbooks integration feature is great, but it does not break down the individual families and their payments. It is hard to track without inputting all the information into quickbooks.

description: Overall it's positive. But when things dont work right, or as they should & customers are getting upset at you for something you can't control it's frustrating
author: April M.
pros: Easy class scheduling, parents app access and dashboard, website integration.
cons: New features or changes to system arent announced. So sometimes there's a new learning or we have to change how we used to do things.

review_title: Wonderful initially, poor support and promises
description: Wonderful in setup, poor follow up or support
author: Kris B.
pros: Interaction with the families and passing the administration to them
cons: No promised interaction with Xero and support after initial set up

review_title: Couldn't run my program without it
author: Susan S.
pros: I can't imagine trying to do all of the things ICP does without a system like this in place. It keeps everything I need together. It does have a few issues every once in a while, but customer service is very responsive.
cons: I often send group communications and see many people don't get them even though they are signed up to receive my emails. Same issue with group billing. Several cards just won't run when I do batch billing.

description: Love them! I’ve been with them at least 15yrs.
author: Scott B.
pros: The interface is great and the tech support is awesome!
cons: The credit card rates are higher than others.

review_title: iClassPro, the backbone of our service business' needs
description: Great support, if we need something there is always someone who reaches out right away, so we know they received and that they are working on a solution.
author: Ellen S.
pros: Ease to learn and navigate, there are a multitude of reports we can produce, they are always evolving and improving systems. Listen to their customers and make changes and updates as needed.
cons: When it's down, we literally cannot work.

description: Exceptional experience. I have been with them since 2011 and while we still have alot to learn about all the features, iclasspro serves our needs 100%.
author: Debbie S.
pros: End user friendly. Looks current and stays updated.
cons: not much, went through the early years of a learning curve with them growing. However, they alway listen and work on improving as needed for the industry.

review_title: iclass is simply the best for all Fitness and Gymnastics Management
description: I have had a great experience with iclass. All customer service encounters have been helpful, guides and resources are great and overall programming is straightforward and constantly updating with great features!
author: Courtney W.
pros: iclassPro is designed simply and efficiently. This makes it easy for everyone to use. From Instructors, front end and management it helps streamline multiple processes in a few easy steps.
cons: The invoicing system. I would love to be able to customize individual invoices and send them directly through iclass. Being able to add an invoice number or add specific services and change pricing amounts would be so helpful to our services. I would also love to see a training on basics of iclass and how to use all functions from a basics training level for new staff to get an overview.

author: Grace P.
pros: I like that it is user friendly for both the customer and the administrator. The set up wizards really walk you thru everything.
cons: The cost seems like a lot. Some of it is out of their control when it comes to the credit card processing fees. I would like to see other options for processing - not just the one available.

description: Overall our experience with I-class is a positive one. The set up process was easy and the software is easy to use and is an excellent class management system. A+ customer service!
author: Jen O.
pros: Their customer service is always friendly and helpful. The registration and management of classes is easy as is the billing processes, and booking of parties. I also like that they are always looking at ways to improve and adding in new features to enhance the program.
cons: Some of the reports don't give what we are looking for sometimes, and would love to see a feature for when someone is out for an Injury.

description: Overall, my experience with iClassPro has been a positive one. I especially appreciate that it allows customers to manage their own accounts, which adds convenience and transparency. The support team has also been great—responsive and helpful whenever issues arise. However, one area that could be improved is the audit trail; some important details are missing, which can make tracking changes more challenging."
author: Corine S.
pros: What I like most about iClassPro is that it empowers customers to manage their own accounts independently.
cons: What I like least about iClassPro is that it lacks some important audit details, which can make tracking changes more difficult."

description: Good most things work well - issues are dealt with easily
author: Joy W.
pros: Everything is in one spot. Most reports are already set up for you
cons: Having to go out of screens to find out information and then go back in instead of being able to click within the screen you are in. E.g. In a student's file and parent's ask a question about another class and you have to leave what you are doing with them to find the information and then come back in - so time consuming

description: Overall, using iClassPro has been a great benefit for us. Customers can clearly see which classes their children are enrolled in, add medical information, and request make-up classes. The Parent Portal and associated app make it easy for them to access too.
author: Caleb T.
pros: iClassPro helps you organise your classes and organise your students in those classes! In addition, there are many other features to help run a business smoothly like billing customers, and distributing newsletters.
cons: Some features are very useful but could be better. The skill tracking for example, is a great addition as it helps track athletes on their journey. But the skill tree can grow very quickly. Billing can be a bit complex too, as there are a lot of different billing methods.

description: Pretty great experience, wish new features came out more often!
author: Emily A.
pros: I like the ease of use and how easy it is to connect with service representatives at any time. I also love the way that we can do everything ourselves and do not have to wait for someone else to update it like other systems.
cons: I do not like that we can not add pictures to Iclass classes without having to use levels.

author: Tammy A.
pros: Customer Service. They are wonderful!! They are great with the little things and the big things.
cons: It would be nice to be able to add service fees to CC and eCheck payments.

description: Amazing!!! The customer service is on point.
author: Kelsey K.
pros: Very user friendly, reliable and GREAT customer service.
cons: No complaints. It is a very user friendly program.

author: Karim Z.
pros: Ease of use, great support team, numerous features released every quarter, modern
cons: Open Integrations, and thats about it. We're very please with this product!

author: Amber R.
pros: I like the ease of use & how easy it is to train staff on the system. It's very intuitive.
cons: The reporting feature of iClassPro is very detailed, but it can be extremely difficult to pull what you want & can take a long time to figure out what some of the filters mean. I wish there was more reporting on email open rates as well. More reporting for Sales & Marketing would be very helpful as there are really only a few reports that directly relate to marketing.
